further_reading.title: AI and ML Perspective: Cost Optimization
further_reading.why_relevant: Supports the module's overall framing around measuring training, inference, storage, and operational costs instead of treating AI infrastructure cost as a single number.

further_reading.title: Design Storage for AI and ML Workloads in Google Cloud
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful background for the module's storage-lifecycle discussion, especially separating active, archival, and reproducible data concerns.

further_reading.title: AWS Well-Architected Framework: Cost Optimization Pillar
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides a second major-cloud reference for cost-model thinking, resource right-sizing, and recurring operational cost discipline.

notes: No inline-claim seed entries were generated because the module is predominantly pedagogical and hypothetical. The worked-example figures are explicitly illustrative rather than presented as real-world measured facts, dated vendor prices, or incident claims. If a future revision adds concrete vendor pricing, benchmark numbers, or real incident anecdotes, those should be seeded for inline citation.
